summary_en: 7,800 shares acquired in May 2026 at ¥12.36M. Cumulative acquisitions through May 31: 50,300 shares (2.0% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury) at ¥85.67M. Authorized limit: 60,000 shares (2.4% S/O) at ¥150M, execution window Feb 16–Jul 31, 2026. Method: open-market purchase via TSE trading mandate.
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Treasury Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: IMAGE MAGIC Inc. reported treasury share acquisition progress for May 2026. In the month of May alone, the company acquired 7,800 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥12,363,600 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under a trading mandate agreement. As of May 31, 2026, cumulative acquisitions under the board authorization granted on February 13, 2026 reached 50,300 shares (representing 2.0% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) at a cumulative cost of ¥85,665,800. The authorized program permits acquisition of up to 60,000 shares (2.4% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥150,000,000 during the execution window from February 16 to July 31, 2026. The company has consumed 83.8% of the yen authorization limit and 83.8% of the share authorization limit to date.
